# manuscript/

Code-generated figures and SI tables bound to the paper.

**What lives here:** PNG/PDF figures generated by `scripts/` and `workflow/rules/`,
SI tables generated from analysis runs.

**What does NOT live here:** Manuscript prose. That stays in the companion vault at
`04-projects/dnamrnaseq/manuscript/` or `06-writing/dnamrnaseq-trajectory-atlas/`.

See Section 13.2 of the v2.2 analysis plan for the rationale for this split.

## Subdirectories

- `figures/` — exported figures (PNG, PDF, SVG) for the paper
- `supplementary/` — SI tables (TSV/CSV), generated from analysis run outputs
